title: GMS Week 28 - SUMMER SUFFERANCE!
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 14/07/2025
Image reference: 2025-07-14_gms-week-28-summer-sufferance_img1.jpg
Trump's twisted tariff tantrums went terminal this week after his self-imposed July 1st deadline to major U.S. trade partners on presentingpotential proposals to offset his tariffs saw no response from trading nations that were in his crosshairs. As a result, a new deadline of August 1st, 2025, has been put forth as the final date to respond, all while tariffs ranging from 15% to 50% on nations from Bangladesh to Brazil are reportedly set to automatically kick into gear by the end of this month.
